titleStmt.title: SII 31.218: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 218. (A.R. No. B 169 of 1938.) TIṆṆAṆŪR, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHENGLEPUT DISTRICT, TAMIL NADU.

summary.p: East wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bhaktavatsala Perumal temple.
This dated in Śaka 1554, Āngīrasa, Vaiśākha., śu • • • • .

Incomplete and registers the gift of land (details are not mentioned) for worships and offerings, viz., Dadyōdanaṁ, Tiruvisam, Dōśapaḍi, Appupaḍi, Tirumāle vaḍapaḍi, to the god Bhaktavatsala perumāl situated at Tiruniṇṟavū by China Ōbalarāja, son of Ōbarāja and grand son of Obuḷarāja, Kāśyapa-gōtra and Yajuśakha and Āpastaṁbḥa sūtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . ni¨rviṣyumastu . svastiśrī . vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu veyyinniyainūṭa yābainālugu Agunēṭi Āṁgīrasa nāma saṁvatsara vaiśākha śuddha mulu Akhilāṁḍakōṭi bhra(ba)hmaṁḍa
nāyakuṁḍaina tirunanniyūri bhaktavatsala perumāḷaku nityapaḍitaraṁ dudyōdanaṁ tiruvisaṁ dōśapaḍi Appapaḍi tirumālevaḍapaḍi modalaIna nityāragiṁppaṁḍi tirunāḷkugānu kāsya(śya)
pasagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbha(ba)sūtraṁ yajuśśākhāthyāyulaina gatha ri Ōbuḷarājuvāri pautrulu Ōbarājuvāriputrulu cinvaṁbhaḷarājuvāru sama¨rpiṁcina mādaṭṭu bhūdāna dara¨rmmaśāsanaṁ vivaraṁ .
Digital edition of SII 31.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
